styles.label: Verbatim, context-corrected
styles.prompt: Clean obvious transcription glitches and punctuation only. Preserve wording, order, uncertainty, repetitions, and roughness.

styles.label: Light cleanup
styles.prompt: Make the transcript easier to read while preserving the speaker's wording, intent, and level of certainty. Remove filler only when it clearly adds no meaning.

styles.label: Message
styles.prompt: Rewrite as a concise casual message. Keep the speaker's meaning and do not add claims.

styles.label: Email
styles.prompt: Rewrite as a clear email draft with a direct opening, readable paragraphs, and a practical close. Do not invent details.

styles.label: Notes
styles.prompt: Turn the transcript into structured notes with short headings and bullets. Preserve unresolved questions and uncertainty.

styles.label: Blog draft
styles.prompt: Shape the transcript into a rough blog-draft section. Preserve the speaker's actual thinking, caveats, and contradictions. Avoid generic polished AI writing.

styles.label: Command
styles.prompt: Interpret the transcript as an instruction for a local app or coding agent. Keep uncertainty visible, do not invent constraints, and make the requested action concrete.
